prompt: Brainstorm materially different architectures for this offline synchronization problem before we choose one.
Several experts disagree on this policy; elicit independent positions and map their objections before the owner decides.
Determine why migrations repeatedly stop halfway by comparing credible causal explanations and disconfirming evidence.
Forecast the probability that the dependency migration finishes by 30 September and define how the forecast resolves and is scored.
Estimate whether enabling the intervention caused higher retention for eligible users using observational data and explicit assumptions.
Explain why queue backlog oscillates as capacity, delay, retry, and operator behavior feed back over time.
Design the reusable bounded-search and replanning controller for autonomous agents, including verifier and stop semantics.
Design how long-running agents retrieve, compact, invalidate, delete, and hand off context and memory across sessions.
Threat-model this new privileged integration and produce the trust-boundary, attack-path, control, verification, and residual-risk contract.

artifacts.artifact: Threat Model and Security Design Contract

prompt: Run a reproducible cross-domain evidence review with search protocol, screening, source quality, conflicting findings, and calibrated certainty.
Elicit and validate stakeholder needs, scenarios, quality attributes, constraints, acceptance boundaries, and traceability for this new service.
Plan qualitative user interviews and contextual inquiry to learn users' real workflow, barriers, language, and mental models before choosing a product flow.
Design a shared capability vocabulary with stable IDs, multilingual labels, facets, polyhierarchy, mappings, and deprecation semantics.
Formulate and verify a constrained model that allocates agents and runner capacity across jobs under cost, deadline, and eligibility constraints.
Correct the misspelling in this README sentence and run the narrow documentation check.
Tell me the current branch name and whether the working tree has uncommitted files.
Generate distinct architecture options, let independent experts challenge them, then select and record the best durable choice.
Fix a recurring agent failure, audit whether its completion score is being gamed, and evaluate the exact changed Skill before promotion.
Design an automated capacity allocator, guard its objective against Goodhart and gaming, and formulate the constrained optimization model.

artifacts.artifact: Constrained Decision Model with integrated objective contract
